keilor-east.name: FAT CHEF Keilor East
keilor-east.address: Unit 16/235 Milleara Rd, Keilor East VIC 3033, Australia

reviews.author: andrew rigopoulos
reviews.text:
Went to Fat Chef today for lunch 25/01/26 , with a friend of mine and ordered the Beef lovers platter and Calamari plate , and in my entire life of eating out at places i have never tasted food and meat that was so good !!!!
Absolutely amazing food and we will be going back on a regular basis .
This place is awesome and can't wait to go back with my wife and our daughter ,
Well done Fat Chef .
👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.author: Shannon Peterson
reviews.text: Although they had a new system in place, the lovely young waitress was awesome and apologetic. The food was amazing. The service was awesome. Definitely be going back.

reviews.author: Mark Eekelschot
reviews.text: Great value food & plenty of it. We had the $38.90 pp buffet & we had 12 adults & two huge platters full of lamb, chicken, snitzels, chips,salad, horizontal sausage, chicken tenders & fish, with pita bread & associated sauces & dips. We could not finish & we are big eaters!! Awesome 👌 Give them a go, I'm sure you won't be dissapointed 😀

reviews.author: Kaylie Stevens
reviews.text:
Excellent service, cooked very fast and came out hot! The chicken wings were absolutely delicious and we cant stop thinking about them.
The cocktails were excellent!
The reason for only 4 stars is because there was only 1 chorizo 💔
The chairs were comfy, everything was clean, the toilets were also clean. Parking was a tiny bit confusing though.

reviews.author: Joceline Villanueva
reviews.text:
We had the Pork Ribs Platter for 2 . It had a good size of barbecue ribs,  chips, coleslaw, onion rings, chorizo and chicken wings with two dips. Tasted good and very satisfying.

The place is quite popular and they have specials like Parma on Mondays etc. Great for dates, family dinners even after work meals. Also service is friendly and eveeyone is  welcoming.

Menu has ample options and servings are generous! Will definitely be back and will recommend!

reviews.author: Joseph Dela Cruz
reviews.text:
Ordered the mussels and the rib platter. Service was good and friendly and the ambience was nice - albeit a bit dated.

They changed the rib platter from before and it does not come with steak anymore but still a solid choice for 4-6 people. The onions rings and ribs were really solid.

The mussels however, did not taste fresh and were slightly "powdery" and I would skip this next time I'm here.

Overall the food was still solid just skip the mussels.

reviews.author: Sheree Lovell
reviews.text: Seriously AMAZING!! The staff so friendly, polite and accommodating. The food… WOW!! Looked sensational and tasted better!! It’s not often I feel so very full but not sick from being too full, if you know then you know 😉 wherever you are when passing this location you MUST eat here!! 🤩

carrum-downs.name: FAT CHEF Carrum Downs
carrum-downs.address: The Local Village, 1095 Frankston - Dandenong Rd, Carrum Downs VIC 3201, Australia

reviews.author: Jackie Saluni
reviews.text: I highly recommend Fat Chef Carrum Downs.  We came here last year in December as a family of 7 and ordered their premium board which includes a massive tomahawk steak, porterhouse steaks, lamb skewers, juicy parmas x4, grilled chicken strips and usually prawns and calamari.  Due to our religious dietary requirements, they happily offered us alternates for the prawn and calamari.  We all ate more than enough and still couldn’t finish the food and had a lot to take home.  We then decided to book their front event room for my husband’s 50th birthday lunch for an intimate gathering of 55 close family and friends.  We ordered 7 of their premium boards, plus a number of vegetarian meals, garlic bread and wedges as starters and around 18 jugs of soft drinks and bottles of water.  The way Ding and his staff accommodated our group and timed to perfection the cooking and arrival of the food, everything ran smoothly and our guests were more than impressed with the delicious food, the size of the platters and the amazing and friendly staff.  The tomahawk steaks not only added that wow factor but they were cooked perfectly to our taste.  Just amazing!  All this whilst still providing impeccable service and food to the main room for the busy lunch hours.  They didn’t rush us and allowed us to enjoy a wonderful time together in a great venue, with good company and delicious food.  There was so much left for our guests to take home too!  If you’re thinking of a place to eat with the family or to put on an event, I couldn’t recommend this place any more!  We will see you again soon Ding and the fantastic team at Fat Chef Carrum Downs. Thank you and God bless.  Jackie and Noah

reviews.author: mollaneda
reviews.text:
Had lunch with the family and with friends from Adelaide. We loved the Beef Cheek special and the Salmon special of the day.
Service and atmosphere was also good. Staff was very friendly. I would highly recommend the place with family and friends. Will be back again soon. Thanks for the nice experience
